title: The Letter of Muhammad al-Amin to His Brother 'Abdallah al-Ma'mun
description: Abdallah al-Ma'mun19 If your brother's letter-may God protect him from the loss of you-reaches you on the occurrence of that which can be neither averted nor repelled, it being a thing that departed nations and past ages have bequeathed and transmitted one to another, 20 [console yourself 121 with that whereby God has consoled you. Know that God, whose praise is exalted, has chosen for the Commander of the Faithful the better of two dwelling places and the more abundant of two lots.22 God has taken possession of him clean and pure.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
